nodes.title: List Roles
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/roles with Authorization header. Returns array of roles with {id, name, permissions: {canViewAccounts, canEditVouchers, canManageUsers, ...}}.

nodes.title: Create Role
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/roles with {name, permissions: {canViewAccounts, canEditVouchers, ...}}. Creates role with specified permissions. Returns created role.

nodes.title: Update Role
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/roles/:id with {name?, permissions?}. Updates role name and/or permissions. Returns updated role.

nodes.title: Delete Role
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/roles/:id. Removes role and all user-role assignments. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Assign Role to User
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/user-roles with {userId, roleId}. Assigns a role to a user within the business. Returns {userId, roleId, businessId}.

nodes.title: List User Roles
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/user-roles with Authorization header. Returns array of user-role assignments with {userId, roleId, roleName, userName}.

nodes.title: Remove User Role
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/user-roles/:userId. Removes role assignment from user. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.
